steps.title: Find the unit rate
steps.content:
Each choice has the form $t=kd$, so use one row of the table to find the constant of proportionality:
$$9=k(0.18)$$
$$k=\frac{9}{0.18}=50$$

steps.title: Write the matching equation
steps.content: A rate of $50$ minutes per mile gives the model $$t=50d$$ The answer is A.
